visual_description: A close-up, shaky shot focuses on a man in a dark suit and white collared shirt. The camera is initially blurry, then slowly comes into focus on his face. He is an older man with round, wire-rimmed glasses and a serious, contemplative expression. The background is a soft, out-of-focus green and brown, suggesting an indoor office or study setting. The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing another man in the background. This man is also in a suit and tie, with slicked-back hair and similar glasses. He maintains a stern, focused gaze, looking slightly downward. The shot remains a close-up, capturing his intense expression against the same muted, blurred background. The audio consists solely of a series of soft, rustling sounds, like the gentle movement of fabric or papers being handled. The sounds are quiet and have a slightly muffled quality, suggesting they are happening in a close-up, intimate space. There is no dialogue or background music, creating a still and focused atmosphere.
